title: Homalium involucratum
intro: Homalium involucratum is a species of flowering plant in the family Salicaceae, commonly known as a tree or shrub native to tropical Africa. The plant is valued for its potential health benefits, including its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which may help alleviate symptoms of fever, cough, and respiratory infections. Bioactive constituents of Homalium involucratum include flavonoids, phenolic acids, and other compounds with antioxidant and antiparasitic activities. In traditional medicine, the plant is often used to prepare herbal remedies, such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are used to treat various ailments, including fever, cough, and respiratory issues.
